initial_draft:
<proposal count> 3 </proposal count>
<my resources> ZUP: 100 </my resources>
<my goals> Buy resources with <ZUP>. You are willing to pay at most X: 60 ZUP for the resources. </my goals>
<reason> Player RED has accepted the trade at 50 ZUP, which is within my budget. No further action is needed.</reason>
<player answer> B) Accept the trade </player answer>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>
<message> Great! I accept the trade as well. Thank you for negotiating with me, Player RED!</message>

iterations.feedback:
<critique>
1. Format: OK. All tags are present in the correct order and contain valid content.
2. Payoff alignment: OK. Accepting at 50 ZUP is within my budget of 60 ZUP. I have successfully purchased the X within my valuation.
3. Opponent plausibility: OK. The opponent explicitly accepted my previous proposal of 50 ZUP.
4. Consistency: OK. The reason accurately reflects accepting the trade. The message is consistent with accepting the trade.
5. Rule compliance: OK. I have used 3 proposals and am now only accepting or rejecting.
</critique>
